author: @az.tek.00
text:
RIP. Brother, Youtube algorithm gave me your channel in later years. Now that you're gone, it's humbling to get to know whom you are online. 

We always think that things can be done later or catch up with plenty of time. Thank you for being so open and honest with us. You are a hero in more ways than one. 

To be so adventurous and courageously dedicated to applied scientific research and continued education in the real world. Thank you for everything.

Godspeed and much love. 💙🌐🕯🤍🌟

author: @tokesnation
text: Delightful. I find you fascinating Robert Murray-Smith. Thanks for all your wonderful videos.

author: @onlywhenprovoked
text: I really like what you did for the tuner system, very creative and thrifty.
